description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized human figure with a circular, radiating head and an arm raised above, holding a crescent moon. The figure's body is elongated and adorned with geometric patterns, including a prominent circular motif on the torso. Surrounding the head and arm are star-shaped elements, giving the impression of a celestial or cosmic theme. The surface appears weathered, with a patina suggesting it is made of metal, possibly bronze or iron. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, with the celestial motifs more visible from the front and side. The overall form is slender, with a solid base for stability.
description: A weathered metal sculpture of a stylized human figure holding a crescent moon, surrounded by star motifs and geometric patterns.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full figure, crescent moon, radiating head, and star motifs clearly.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the sculpture's slender profile and the three-dimensional arrangement of the celestial motifs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the figure and the arrangement of the stars and crescent moon, with less detail on the body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the thickness of the sculpture and the protruding celestial elements.
attribute_subject_matter: stylized human figure with celestial motifs
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
